questionHtml: Outline how water and carbon dioxide absorb infrared radiation.
markschemeHtml:
bond length changes

OR

«asymmetric» stretching «of bonds»

OR

bond angle changes/bends

OR

polarity/dipole «moment» changes

OR

a dipole «moment» is created «when the molecule absorbs IR»

Accept “vibration of bonds” OR appropriate diagram

meta.title: Outline how water and carbon dioxide absorb infrared radiation.
